metadata.review_guidance: Receiving party must use at least reasonable care. Term should be at least 2 years for vendor NDAs.
metadata.preferred_position: The receiving party shall protect Confidential Information using no less than reasonable care and industry-standard safeguards.

sections.title: Confidentiality Standard
sections.text: The receiving party shall protect Confidential Information using no less than reasonable care and industry-standard safeguards. Confidential Information includes all non-public business, technical, and financial information disclosed by the disclosing party.

sections.title: Term Standard
sections.text: NDA term shall be no less than two (2) years from the Effective Date.
